shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #3BBEAC, background #1E1E2E, and accent #FFD700.
Canvas target stays 1920x1080px with pixel-perfect nearest-neighbor presentation at 60 FPS.
Rendering stays 2D pixel art with flat shading and a 1px dark moss outline.
The result popup keeps a centered 600x400px card size and dark slate framing.
differences: The tone shifts to warning orange and muted teal accents that support a failure state.
The title banner reserves extra contrast for a direct game-over label and collapse summary.
Corner ornaments use cracked mud glyphs so failure feels distinct.

context.usage: Centered result card shown after balance collapse or target failure.

specs.shading: Flat failure card fill with a strong warning border.

acceptance_criteria: Popup texture size is exactly 600x400px with space for a title banner, summary panel, and two action buttons.
Failure accents are visually distinct within one glance at native scale.
The title banner remains readable over the dark slate body.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_gameplay_balance
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 9x7 board, balance axis, route overlay, and HUD placement.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the pastel mud farm palette and warm pixel-art tone.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: ImageBundle popup root with child text and button nodes.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_popup_game_over_600x400.png during the Loading state and bind it to the failure result UI state.
runtime_notes: Reuse the same child-node layout as other result popups when orchestration adds more states.
Keep numbers and button labels dynamic.
Expose retry and menu buttons through explicit components.
